entry.title: Re: SAP Job Opportunities | Germany | Romania | Poland | Denmark
entry.content:
Hello Sugar,

I am an SAP-certified professional eager to apply my knowledge in a real-world setting. With certifications in End-to-End Business Processes for the Intelligent Enterprise and Business Process Integration with SAP S/4HANA, I have built a strong theoretical foundation in SAP solutions. However, I recognize that hands-on experience is key to excelling in this field.

I am actively seeking opportunities to contribute, learn, and grow—whether through an entry-level role, internship, or even voluntary work. My background in business analysis, research, and process optimization enables me to quickly adapt, analyze systems, and provide valuable insights. I am driven, detail-oriented, and ready to immerse myself in practical SAP implementations.

If there’s an opportunity to be part of your team, I would love to discuss how I can add value while honing my skills. Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Mustapha Badmus
Badmusmustapha67@gmail.com

entry.title: How to define as visible the "previous value" Checkbox in autoflow Rules?
entry.content:
As i saw in the documention it is possible to create auto flow rules based on "Previous value" with check box "previous value". However, when I go to autoflow Rules i don't have any check box. As in the image bellow

 

Expected behaviour

How can i activate this feature?

Thanks

entry.title: LMS Time zone issue in classes
entry.content:
Hi team,

one of our LMS admin has Timezone issues. he sees Everything displayed in UTC although it needs to be Greenwich Mean Time (Europe/London). Also his EC file seems to have him set on Europe/London(Greenwich Mean Time). He also seems to have it selected to display classes in his timezone under view preferences.SO why this issue with classes display in the catalog as 1 hour out for this user?

Any inputs here?

Thank you.

Kind regards,

kumar

entry.title: Exporting workspaces in Enable Now cloud
entry.content:
We are in the process of consolidating 3 SEN instances into one. As per my knowledge on this, I will need to export the content from each workspace, recreate the workspaces in the new instance and then import all content. Is this the easiest way to do so? Are there any existing tools which can simply this?

There are several workspaces to be exported and the instances are in different company accounts, so creating an SR is not really an option.

Thanks!

entry.title: Combine SAP CAP & SAP HANA Cloud CodeJam in Krakow, Poland!
entry.content:
Hi Community,

we have a new CodeJam planned for the topic of "Combine SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud to Create Full-Stack Applications". The CodeJam will be held in Krakow, Poland on the 24th of April, 2025.

The seating is limited to 15 attendees.

If you want to learn more about the event and register to join me, for a full day of CAP and HANA, click on the link below:

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/sap-cloud-application-programming-model-with-sap-hana-cloud/ec-p/14035745#M765

See you in Poland!

entry.title: Re: API extract all departments including head / manager...
entry.content: Looks like there is a data field called Head of Unit which we might user. Technically easy - but we need to attach process to it, so testing may take a while

entry.title: Use Corporate IDP to access Administration Console of Cloud Identity Service
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

We are currently struggling to setup access to the Administration Console of the SAP Cloud Identity Service via a Corporate IDP.

As described in the following articles, this should be possible.

  • Is it possible to enable Single-Sign On ( SSO ) to login to IAS administration console - SAP Community
  • Azure as IDP for IAS - SAP Community
  • Authenticating Identity Provider for an Application - SAP Help 

 

What we did:

  1. Created a new enterprise application inside Entra ID with the SAML file downloaded from SAP IAS and assigned the user to the application (as explained here)
  2. Created Corporate Identity Provider inside SAP IAS with SAML file downloaded from Entra ID application
  3. Added Conditional Authentication Rule to the Administration Console Application
    -> Use Corporate IDP for a specific domain (Default set to Identity Authentication)

 

Result:

When https://<tenant-id>.trial-accounts.ondemand.com/admin/ is called, it redirects to Corperate IDP (after email input)

There, the login will take place normally and there is a redirect to the follwoing urls:

  1. (GET) https://<tenant-id>.trial-accounts.ondemand.com/admin/
  2. (GET) https://<tenant-id>.trial-accounts.ondemand.com/saml2/idp/sso?sp=oac.accounts.sap.com&RelayState=https%3A%2F%2F<tenant-id>.trial-accounts.ondemand.com%2Fadmin%2F
  3. (POST) https://<tenant-id>.trial-accounts.ondemand.com/saml2/sp/acs/oac.accounts.sap.com

The last call returned: 404 - Not Found

When we add the conditional authentication rule to another application, it works.

Is there anything we have overlooked?

 

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: Re: Signavio Active Users list
entry.content:
Hello Sam,

As you have probably discovered, I do not believe this piece of information is available out-of-the-box. It would be very useful though. Unless someone else has a suggestion, perhaps you can submit a Feature Request with Signavio support to add it? As well, a submission through Customer Influence (other organizations can vote on your idea), may help support and get it implemented.

Regards,
Shawn

entry.title: Display totals lines above the entries in S_PL0_86000032?
entry.content:
I want to show the total lines above the entries. However, this 'Display' option is not working for the financial statement version subtotals (yellow):

So I guess I need to change this on the report form?
How do I know which form is being used, and can it be edited in FGI2?

entry.title: Re: Dump ACCESS_DENIED | cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_download
entry.content: Preferably in text format, also provide SAP GUI version.

entry.title: Re: Dump ACCESS_DENIED | cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_do...
entry.content:
Whithout the text of the dump, it will be hard to check.

  • Is the file locked by another process (word, notepad, etc.)
  • does the user click 'no' on an override pop-up (or does the file already exist, and you deactivated the confirmation popup)
  • etc.

entry.title: SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 & Grow with SAP: How to get started?
entry.content:
With SAP Sales Cloud, organizations will benefit from leading sales automation capabilities that are powered by cutting-edge artificial intelligence (AI) and generative AI. SAP Sales Cloud is now part of SAP GROW Premium Edition. It provides the opportunity for organizations to maximize revenue generation and improve the buying experience.

With SAP Sales Cloud, sales organizations can optimize B2B sales processes by:

  • Delivering effective sales engagements that drive revenue and customer loyalty through a single, connected view of data, processes, and people
  • Helping sellers focus on key business priorities through guided sales actions and customer insights
  • Adapting to new market opportunities through intelligent, flexible sales processes that use data and AI to inform the next best action

Together with GROW with SAP and Concur Expense, organizations can achieve a complete lead-to-cash process delivered on cloud-native and user-centric user experience (UX) at the lowest possible TCO. 

Why SAP GROW Premium Edition and SAP Sales Cloud?​

Competitive Advantages:

  1. Lowering TCO and optimizing an integrated lead to cash and issue to resolution process
  2. This helps shorten time to value via business AI which allows to automate low value tasks and personalize high value tasks
  3. This further accelerates innovation by rapidly deploying industry-tailored new business models, routes to market, or use cases that are connected via SAP BTP. For businesses that have integrated SAP ERP and SAP CX, the result is the ability to maximize their cloud ERP investments, empower all employees with digital tools and AI-powered customer insights, and eliminate manual intervention—reducing the cost to serve and driving profitability

 

In a newly released ES offering, you will be guided on

  • How to request, access, provision and get onboarded to your solution.
  • Managing organizational structure, user authorisations and Master data. 
  • How to configure Leads, opporunties and quotes
  • How to use playbooks to progress your leads and opportunities
  • Enabling intelligent Sales, Analytics and autoflows. 

This asset is available in the SAP Learning Hub. To access them, you'll need to complete a one-time registration. You can find all the details and sign up here: SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support.

entry.title: Header Freight condition to distribute based on Quantity of PO line item
entry.content:
Hello,

We have defined a header condition for the freight value, which should be distributed equally among the PO line items based on their respective quantities rather than the percentage of their value relative to the total PO amount.

Example:

Line ItemMaterialQuantityNet Price (Rs.)Total (Rs.)
1xxx5525
2yyy1010100
3zzz1515225

Total Quantity: 30
Total Value: Rs. 350

Currently, if the Header Freight Value (HFV) = Rs. 1000, it is being distributed based on the value percentage of each line item. For example, Line Item 1, with a total value of Rs. 25, contributes 7.14% to the total PO value (Rs. 350). Accordingly, 7.14% of Rs. 1000 (i.e., Rs. 71.43) is allocated to Line Item 1.

However, our requirement is to distribute the HFV based on the quantity of PO line items rather than their value percentage. For example, Line Item 1 has a quantity of 5, which is 16.66% of the total quantity (30). Therefore, 16.66% of Rs. 1000 (i.e., Rs. 166.66) should be allocated to Line Item 1.

We need to configure the system to distribute the HFV proportionally based on the quantity of each PO line item instead of its value percentage. Could you please suggest the possible solutions to achieve this?

Thanks,

Sabarinathan K

entry.title: How to search within specific object type (or other advanced searches) in ADT
entry.content:
How can I search a specific object type in an ABAP project in ADT.

For example I can in GUI search

  • All function modules with name "z*trace*" in SE37
  • All programs with name "SAPMZ*" in SE38
  • All classes with name "ZCL_*", with short description "CATS:*" and last changed by user "my_user"
  • etc

In eclips I only know the CTRL+h search and that is not very usefull.

Do I have other better options in Eclipse/ADT than CTRL+h

entry.title: Re: electronic document service installation failed
entry.content: hi aramos_sci, after uninstallation of EDS its possible to install the update SP2411 or FP2502 but without the component EDS. The installation of EDS always fails.

entry.title: Re: electronic document service installation failed
entry.content: hi ankit_chauhan, after the uninstallation of EDS it's possible to install the update of SP2411 or FP2502 but without the component EDS. The installation of EDS still fails.

entry.title: Re: Which block to consider for customer Central block, d...
entry.content:
Arghyadip

# Use Central block (XK05), if the customer needs to be completely restricted across the system

# Use Sales Area block (VD05),  if only sales-related processes need to be blocked.

# Use company code block (FK05), if only financial transactions need to be stopped.

# Deletion flag (XD06), is for customers with no open documents and should be used when you're sure the customer will no longer be needed.

Choose the block based on the process you want to restrict while maintaining operational flexibility. I hope it works 

Thank you, 

Sreekanth

entry.title: Re: Buyoffs in Production Orders SAP PEO
entry.content: How to configure the functions for buyoffs

entry.title: Mail in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to send an email in the public cloud. It is shown as "sent" in the Email Control app. The domain has been defined for both inbound and outbound, but the email does not arrive, neither in the spam folder nor in the inbox. I have not set up a mail server in the BTP nor created any communication arrangements, as this was not included in the Scope 1QL. What do I need to do, and where can I get the information from? See Screenshot. Or is mail Sending in the Starter System not possible? SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Thank you and best regards

entry.title: Re: what does "fra3" in the FQDN stand for?
entry.content: any update please? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Connect Postman with Cloud ALM to create Project using RestAPI
entry.content:
Hi All Experts , 

This post is to seek your guidance ( step by step ) on connecting my Postman with my SAP Cloud ALM environment.

I don't have any SAP BTP configured.

I have servicekey details from my SAP Cloud ALM environment which has all details as below :

1) Endpoint : API
2) uaa : tenantmode
3) uaa : sburl
4) uaa : subaccountid
5) uaa : credential-type
6) uaa : clientid
7) uaa : clientsecret
😎 uaa : url
9) uaa : uaadomain
10) uaa : verificationkey
11) uaa : apiurl
12) uaa : identityzone
13) uaa : identityzoneid
14) uaa : tenantid
15) uaa : zoneid

Please guide me with steps that I need to follow to achieve this Goal of creating projects in my Cloud ALM Environment please.

Thanks

Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Creating/enabling a new WFA on HANA instance

We will also use your reply as confirmation for the upload of the measure template. Could we already start with the import of the Starter Package configuration? Or do we need to wait for the standard measures to be uploaded first by Support?

entry.title: No ATD quantity available.
entry.content:
Hi,

When I run TLB, I see the order number is generated. However, when I pick that order no. and run TLB it gives error message - No ATD quantity available.

There is enough stock to be deployed. The deployment run has proposed the deployment stock transfer release but when running TLB it pops with this error of ATD. Can you please help me understand the reason why is system not permitting me to create TLB. Any inputs will be great to know.

Thanks

entry.title: Tabel for open contracts qty
entry.content:
HI,

How can i find a table who tells me from all open contracts the rest volume?

We use VA41 to 5  to create and view but it shows only the Targetvolume and if I enter in the detail i could see the call of qty. ( RV45A -> KWMENG   Table isn´t find under SE16N  )  Need help. 

SAP HANA

BR Pe@t

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Multi Action API Step
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am trying to define a Multi Action with a single API step. I have successfully created the HTTP API Connection.

My goal is to call the AI CORE API to create an execution, but I don't believe this is the main issue. The problem I'm encountering is that I need to include a header that is neither "prefer" nor starts with "x-". From what I see in the screenshot below, the third case should allow me to use a header like "ai-resource-group", but it doesn’t seem to work as expected.

 

Is there a way to make this work? It seems strange that it's not allowing something like this.

 

Thank you,

Enrico

Can you please help me here.. am stuck on this issue from 3 weeks.. tried different ways to deploy my webide imported project in bas but nothing worked except these steps and still i have no url for the deployed appication. thanks.

entry.title: CREAR SUBCARACTERISTICA EN PE03
entry.content:

¿Alguien sabe como se ha de crear este tipo de nodo? La tengo definida como subcaracteristica en el aparatado de atributos, pero no se que ocurre. 

Gracias,

Miguel

entry.title: Re: WebServices: Virtual Interface not Found Error
entry.content: Can you please provide the NOTE number to resolve this issue

entry.title: Re: Show UDF from SAP B1 in SAP Customer Checkout Sales s...
entry.content:
Hi @Javokhir_Isroilov 

To show the UDF in the items search screen you can go to Configuration > Dialog settings and for the items option you can activate the visibility of the field and its position.

Now, in the sales screen I think there is no option by standard solution, you should develop a plugin, maybe this blog can help. 
https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-members/modify-receipt-component-in-sap-customer-checkout-ui/ba-p/13508232

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM and Servicenow Interation Error - 502 BAD_GATEWAY
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am getting below error while sending incidents details from SAP ALM to Servienow. The webhook configured with LMS End Point with LMS Service and LMS End Point. 

{ "errorDetails": { "code":"502 BAD_GATEWAY", "message":"The notification was sent successfully but the returned response is an unknown type ", "target":"/message", "details":[]}}

Kindly help on this.

Regards,

Arsul

entry.title: Documents not integrated between TPV and SAP
entry.content:
hello in the company we are relatively new using SAPB1 and especially TPV, we had an incident with one of the teams and due to ignorance, we took a step that harmed us with the integration of TPV documents to SAP and we don't see how we can correct the incident.

 

Documents are not integrated because they indicate that related documents already exist.

 

I show you in the picture:

 

Has this happened to anyone in the forum? You may be able to guide me with a solution to this type of incident? 

 

Thank you in advance for the help

 

Best regards

Harvey Oropeza.

entry.title: How to set different dispatch date for New and Change Purchase order in OPD
entry.content:
We would like to have dispatch date 1 - immediately for "New" purchase order and dispatch date 2 - scheduled for "Change" purchase order (with change indicator = 'X').


How do we set this up in the Output parameter determination app?


"Change indicator" is not available in the list of condition parameter.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set different dispatch date for New and Change...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

  1. Please take a look at page 42 /4.3.3 Output Parameter Determination.

entry.title: Re: Inventory Accounting with Universal Parallel Accounting in SAP S/4HANA 2022

We plan to enable the use of external valuation via valuation alternatives in CKMLCP with OP2025. Watch the roadmap explorer for further details.

Regards, Janet

entry.title: Re: Dump ACCESS_DENIED | cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_do...
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

Thanks for the reply.

I have sent the dump as an attachment.

A few days ago I was able to get the dump and I noticed that apparently the file was not in use. Both answers were given to the rewrite popup as far as I remember. Yesterday and today I was not able to get the dump, the download was always successful.

Thanks. Regards.

Maria João Rocha

Using Native Android applications, there is no WebView, can you still use the CCT then? I was hoping that we could read a Token from the BTP and pass to the subsequent Applications to login. We have noticed that if an application is already open in the background and we call it, then the credentials are not prompted for.

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman

Regarding probably why 2022 image doesn't launch natively - you're probably right. I saw the same error today regarding PID / rosetta engine.
You also mentioned that 1909 runs on Sybase? Is that really the case? In dbacockpit it is listed as HANA. Bests Tom 

DBA Cockpit 19091909 Trial2022 Trial

entry.title: Re: How to setup permissions in People Analytics so that employees see their own data in story repor
entry.content: Most likely, the role with which you shared the report contains group with access to direct reports excluding self. You need focus on Permissions&roles. There is no way you can do it directly in the story report.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@freder1k_han - Appreciate your question. To clarify, SAP's data and analytics, like Datasphere and SAC, are being integrated into the Business Data Cloud (BDC) framework. While our current focus for SAP-managed Data Products is on S/4HANA PCE and Public Cloud, we are actively planning to include other SAP LoB applications. For your S/4HANA on-premise system, BDC will be the primary access point for data and metadata. As we release more SAP Data Products, you'll have increasing options for data access and also an opportunity to shift S/4 PCE over time. Also, a new Customer-Managed Insight App for non-RISE customers will allow you to license SAP Business Data Cloud with an Insight App. Details will be published soon after GA in April,2025.

Thank you,

Jeet

entry.title: SAP project system
entry.content:

Message class CY

Message no 376

entry.title: how to configure functions for buyoff templates in shopfloor routing - MPE_BUYOFF_MSGS004

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP behavior definition error with Lock master
entry.content:
Hi,

had the same issue. Like Patrick Winkler wrote. You have to add the association to table 1 in the behavior defintion of table 3. Works for me now.

Regards

Lennart

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@albertosimeoni Along with BDC, customer will also be using native integration capabilities of SAP Datasphere and SAP Databricks -> Create a connection of type HTTP

Happy Learning, Jeet

entry.title: Re: Story Report for Goal Management - how many employees have set goals, who doesnt have any
entry.content:
you need:

1. to create a calculated column in Query to differentiate employees with and without goals.

2. in the Designer mode create a chart where you add a measure "Headcount" and as a dimension your calculated column "With/without goals".

3. Then you should create a table and link it with a chart to be able to drill down.

entry.title: Re: Architecture overview of SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC)
entry.content: A very good high level overview Ali.

entry.title: Webinar 13/03: Smart Cloud Spending: Leveraging FinOps and UDM in SAP BTP ✨
entry.content:
Join us on YouTube on Thursday, March 13th 2025, for a discussion on: 

Smart Cloud Spending: Leveraging FinOps and UDM in SAP BTP ✨

Link: https://www.youtube.com/live/5qIjskfkTyc

📢Speakers:

  • Eran Lahav | Product Manager, SAP Metering & FinOps
  • Willem Pardaens | BTP Architect & Product Expert, Global CoE

🎬 Host:

  • Tania Dinnendahl - Executive Liaison Manager, SAP Global User Groups Organization

No registration required.

entry.title: SAP BAS, sap/hana-client and SAP HANA on-prem: “Cannot resolve host name”
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

We are trying to access our SAP HANA on-premise database within SAP BAS, but we are already having problems logging in because the host cannot be resolved:

 

 

Error: Connection failed (RTE:[89001] Cannot resolve host name 'hana.on_prem.local' rc=-2: Name or service not known (hana.on_prem.local))

 

 

 

Here is the small mini script (nodejs sap/hana-client):

If we run this code locally in VS Code while we are in the company network, the host can be resolved and we can successfully connect to our SAP HANA on-premise, so we suspect the error is in the BTP or CloudConnector.


The associated Cloud Connector in the BTP subaccount is properly set up and "reachable":

 

 


 

 Do we need to specify anything else in the parameters for the “conn.connect…” call?
Perhaps location_id or something similar?

Is our assumption correct that “conn.connect…” uses a TCP connection?

Do we then need SOCKS5? If so, how do we set this up?

https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/using-tcp-protocol-for-cloud-applications?q=socks5

We are grateful for any advice!

Many thanks and best regards,

Marco

entry.title: Re: Pre-Migration Check Tool SMIGR_CHECK_DB6: Be Better Prepared for the Migration of Your Db2 LUW D
entry.content: Edit/update March 6, 2025:  SMIGR_CHECK_DB6 has been updated and can now show the status of the adaptive workload manager which is available as of Db2 12.1, and the Db2 workload manager which exists up to and including Db2 11.5

entry.title: Offboarding employees from SuccessFactors Microsoft
entry.content:
When employees have no active employment in SuccessFactors - the following fields are altered:
activeEmploymentsCount = 0

emplStatus = T

userStatus = f 

We use AccountDisabled to toggle users active/inactive in Microsoft AD
Switch([emplStatus], "True", "A", "False", "U", "False", "P", "False")

If we change scope to exclude any of these

Scope: 
activeEmploymentsCount NOT_EQUALS 0
emplStatus NOT_EQUALS T
userStatus NOT_EQUALS f

the employee are not included in SuccessFactors to Microsoft Active Directory sync, hence user account in Microsoft Active Directory is still active.

If we change scope and sync users with activeEmploymentsCount > 0 - users without an active employment in SuccessFactors are deactivated. 
However - when we delete users from Active Directory, the sync engine will try to create the deleted users, and deactivate them, and then we cannot delete any users in AD. 

Target Object Actions are Create, Update

What have anyone else done for handling offboarding? 

 

Is there a way to deactivate users without active employment,

entry.title: looking for data profiling template for finance data objects
entry.content: looking for data profiling template for finance data objects for S4 Hana public cloud

entry.title: Re: Dump ACCESS_DENIED | cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_do...
entry.content:
@MariaJoãoRocha If you really call the method like this:

then the ACCESS_DENIED exception will be caught and reported with SY-SUBRC = 15. You should not get a dump in that case. Are you 100% sure you call the method like that?

entry.title: Re: SAP Private linky swear with Azure – running Cloud Connector and SAP Private Link side-by-side
entry.content:
@saurabhkumbhare scenario 1.5 is about enabling the Cloud Connector relay connection to be established via Private Link rather than outbound Internet.

CPI to ECC is a different scenario and already covered here.

KR Martin

Replace Wrapper by Released API | SAP Tutorials

This is piece of code was created to be run outside of the SAP standard frameworks.
So, it can be called from anywhere. We use it in some incoming interfaces.

Please note that I made a small improvement to the code snippet just now

entry.title: Re: Dump ACCESS_DENIED | cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_do...

Dear DominikTylczyn

Inittially the program was not handling exceptions. Exception handling was added after the dump.

 

Thanks, Regards,

entry.title: Re: Signavio Active Users list
entry.content:
Good day Sam-Chambers,

Thank you for sharing your inquiry on the SAP Community.  To obtain the report you are requesting, please contact your Customer Success Manager.  They will trigger a workflow that will activate the report in your workspace. 

Kind regards,

KantriceD

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
Hi @TomHoepping ,

some kind of memory-fail by me... Abap Trial 1909 did indeed run on HANA DB. For some reason when I was writing that post about Sybase, I was looking at a SAP NetWeaver Dev Edition 7.52 mini-sap (the predecessor to Abap Trial 1909) which I happened to have up and running... and that mini-sap does use Sybase... so somehow confused those two old and deprecated mini-SAPs to come up with the Sybase idea.

Sorry for the confusion.

In any case, something about the way in Abap Trial 2022 the HDB is starting up, offends macOS since 14.4 and hence the HDB just cannot somehow get started... similar to what has happened with non-SAP Rosetta-emulated x64/amd64 processes of other containers. So from the point of view of the two Paths of this blog, still only the full VM-emulation Path works i.e. the much slower one.... but no doubt SAP will soon produce an arm64 Abap Trial image and everything will be superfast again... [disclaimer: just a hopeful joke, not expecting this to happen anytime soon].

entry.title: Re: Show UDF from SAP B1 in SAP Customer Checkout Sales s...
entry.content: Hi RicardoRenteria,

entry.title: Re: Signavio Active Users list
entry.content: Thank you Kantrice!

entry.title: Re: Application Passcode for MDK Extension Can't Generate Passcode Error 400 This Feature is Not Ena
entry.content:
@bill_froelich Thank you for your help. Hopefully I can clarify some of the details here. My main goal is to make a Z extension folder for my SSAM project, but I imagine this process applies to any MDK project that an extension folder needs to be created for. The process seems to have changed since the last time I have attempted this as the MDK App extension section did not exist when creating a new project from template.

For the first question, I am retrieving the Mobile Application URL from my destination as described within this section of the Mobile Service documentation here.

https://help.sap.com/doc/f53c64b93e5140918d676b927a3cd65b/Cloud/en-US/docs-en/guides/features/backend-connectivity/admin/config.html

The documentation lists the URL can be found by going to the Connectivity section in the Mobile Services app and clicking the Launch in Browser icon.

According to BAS, it asks that the Mobile Application URL follows the pattern of https://.ondemand.com*.

This appears to be the same format as what is listed in the XML base section for the destination minus the destination name. It just so happens that the site domain listed in the Application Links section of the Mobile Services app happens to be the same URL as what I found here. While I believe this to be the correct URL, I was hoping to confirm this information.

 

For the second question (the question listed in the title of the post), The application passcode appears that it needs to be generated via the link included in this process.

When accessing this link however, it results in the 400 error stating that the feature is not enabled in Mobile Services. I have checked the Mobile Services documentation and looked through Mobile Services myself and cannot find anywhere that I could enable this feature.

 

If you had any information on either of this questions, that would be great. Thank you again for your help.

Mark

entry.title: Re: Dump ACCESS_DENIED | cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_do...
entry.content:
Make sure that confirm overwrite is set to abap_true.
If the problem occurs, try deleting the file in Windows. (Is this file shared by several users, does the disk server have a performance problem, etc.)

Patrick

Is there any settings in SAP Customer Checkout to sychronize UDF value from SAP B1?

In formation I cant see cloud identity service. Is there a way to get it?

thanks

ebsor

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@MKreitlein : Great questions, however intention is to keep the limited as FAQs and not the technical details.

One question regarding No. 12, embedded SAC: I'm not sure where I read or heard it, but I think I understood that the embedded SAC in S/4 HANA Public Cloud would disappear sooner or later?

=>Please refer: SAP Analytics Cloud, embedded edition – the Way Ahead

And my most anticipated question about the Foundation services, is unfortunately still not answered satisfactory 🤔 : Wow exactly will SAP handle the Data Delta Extraction technically, from S4 CDS Views into the Data Lake Files?

=>Upon activation of a Data Product, the Foundation Service (FOS) layer initiates the data replication process. This involves two key steps: 1) The Foundation Service triggers the replication. 2) On the S/4HANA PCE side, the ABAP Data Integration components, specifically the ABAP Push Replication Service (APRS), replicate data from released CDS Views to SAP Business Data Cloud. This replication includes pushing metadata (CSN, ORD), followed by an initial data load, and then ongoing delta updates.

Refer SAP Note: 3500131 - ABAP Data Integration for SAP Business Data Cloud

Will there be lots of Notes or a huge TCI be required to be implemented in S4 or will it be the same technology like today when e.g. using Replication Flows into SAP Datasphere? It would be really helpful if we could see a picture/slide about those technical details soon 🤗

Yes, same like Replication flow scenario. Refer SAP Note: 3500131 - ABAP Data Integration for SAP Business Data Cloud

Happy Learning, Jeet

entry.title: Valuehelp for Migration
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

For the migration to the public cloud, I need to fill out the templates. I don’t have information on which values I need to map, for example, for the base quantity ISO code. On the surface, I can open the value help and see the values, but I cannot copy them. In ERP, I could use SE11 to view the value help and the values. How can I access this information in the public cloud so I can map it correctly?

Thank you!

entry.title: Use a Datasphere View in a SAP CAP service over an HDI container - View not exposed for consumption
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am trying to interact with a Datasphere View from a SAP CAP service. I am following the mission as follows:

https://github.com/SAP-samples/datasphere-build-apps-data-entry

The issue is when I am trying to deploy the SAP CAP service (https://github.com/SAP-samples/datasphere-build-apps-data-entry/tree/main/documentation/develop/deploy-cap-application) as I am getting the error as follows:

error: "SAC$TEC"."HDI_GRANTOR_FOR_CUPS": line 43 col 9 (at pos 2079): Unsupported Feature: Cannot grant the requested privilege, because SAC.ZGV_SO_ICOMMNETS is not exposed for consumption)

This is at high level what we have:

A view created in Datasphere which is exposed for consumption.

 

A technical user with privileges to read and write.

A in BTP a User Provided Service named "datasphere-sac-space-ups" with the details of the above user:

 

{
    "password": "XXXXXXXXX",
    "procedure": "HDI_GRANTOR_FOR_CUPS",
    "procedure_schema": "SAC$TEC",
    "schema": "SAC",
    "tags": [
        "hana"
    ],
    "type": "procedure",
    "user": "SAC#SAC_POC"
}

 

.hdbgrants as follows:

{
	"datasphere-sac-space-ups": {
		"object_owner": {
			"roles": [],
			"container_roles": [],
			"object_privileges": [
                {
				  "type": "VIEW",
				  "name": "ZGV_SO_ICOMMNETS",
				  "privileges_with_grant_option": [
				    "SELECT","READ","WRITE"
				  ]
				}
			]
		}
	}
}

.hdsynonym

{
  "SAP_POC": {
    "target": {
        "schema": "SAC",        
        "object": "ZGV_SO_ICOMMNETS"
    }
  }
}

But unfortunately, we are getting the error already mentioned when deploying the CAP application.

error: "SAC$TEC"."HDI_GRANTOR_FOR_CUPS": line 43 col 9 (at pos 2079): Unsupported Feature: Cannot grant the requested privilege, because SAC.ZGV_SO_ICOMMNETS is not exposed for consumption)

Any ideas about what may be happening?

Thanks in advance!

C.

entry.title: Re: what does "fra3" in the FQDN stand for?
entry.content:
From 3193919 - IP Address Ranges for Cloud for Customer Data Centers seems to be Frankfurt

FRA3 - Frankfurt - Germany157.133.70.32/27

157.133.70.16/28

entry.title: Re: Dump ACCESS_DENIED | cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_do...
entry.content:
Dear raymond_giuseppi,

 

The overwrite is set to true.

As mentioned I was unable to repeat the error. I think I deleted the file and tried with another name. 

I have already asked KUser to give more details.

I will continue to run it to see if I can get the error or if it doesn't happen again in the next few days and since there is no longer a dump but an error message, the ticket is considered closed.

If there is any other solution, I would appreciate it if you could let me know.

Thanks. Regards,

Maria João Rocha

entry.title: Implementation of Application Jobs App in ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 SP01
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to set up the Application Jobs app in ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 SP01. I activated the service in 'sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/nw_aps_apj' SICF, but when I test the service, I receive the error "File NOT found!" in the browser.

I tried to follow the instructions under App Implementation: Application Jobs, but I can't find the APJ_JOB_MANAGEMENT_SRV service in /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE.

Is this feature supported in ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 SP01?

Thanks.

entry.title: Best Practices for Onboarding and MiniEC – With a Focus on Offboarding and Crossboarding
entry.content:
In this blog, the product management @emily_nagengast @Jayananda_Kotri  @smitajalit , product advisor @Shelly_Allen , partner management @PaulT , and knowledge expert team (I, @BarbaraSerio, @emicoke, @CarolinaCLeite, @Kanika_Khullar) would like to share some insights about onboarding with MiniEC and SAP on-prem as an external HRIS system.

What is Employee Central Mini-Master? 

Since Onboarding is built on the same platform as Employee Central it uses the same structure and data model. To maximize the benefits of Onboarding, it’s ideal for Employee Central to be already in place or implemented simultaneously. However in cases where the customer has not licensed Employee Central, a limited version of Employee Central - called EC Mini-Master needs to be used. EC Mini-Master provides the necessary structure and data model, but does not provide the same level of features as full Employee Central. Additionally, it’s important to understand that not all Onboarding features will be available. There are also configuration and setup considerations to keep in mind.

EC Mini-Master comes at no additional cost to the customer. When using EC Mini-Master its necessary to also differentiate between Full EC licensed users and a Functional EC licensed user. 
Typically a full EC licensed user would be an employee of the company, while a functional users would be external and not employed by the company. There are some other scenarios, and a full description can be found on the following help portal guide. Managing User License Compliance  

Below are the two user type scenarios and we will examine both in detail.

  • EC Mini-Master with functional users
  • EC Mini-Master with full EC licenses but full EC not yet implemented

EC Mini-Master with Functional Users

In this scenario, it's not possible to change employee data because no full licenses are available for Employee Central. For that reason, Crossboarding and Offboarding cannot be fully covered. However, there are no technical constraints to triggering those flows. The rules used in managing business configuration will be triggered even if the termination event, for example, is added from SAP on-prem with integration.
Please review the IDP (Implementation Design Principle) document below on custom integration.

SuccessFactors Integrations: Best Practices using SAP SuccessFactors APIs for Custom Integrations

If the employee, manager, and HR team work only on the tasks in the programs and no data reviews are triggered, offboarding and crossboarding processes can be configured.

Note: Restarting onboarding is not supported when using EC Mini-Master with functional users.

Configuration steps/actions:

  1. SAP on-prem mapping configuration for replication of employee data on SF
  2. Configuration of business rule on SF EC to trigger offboarding
  3. Terminate employee in SAP on-prem
  4. Run replication report on SAP on-prem
  5. Intelligent service triggered and offboardee landed in the dashboard

 

 

Employee Data Replication

Employee Data replication, as per Best Practice, must be implemented using Business Integration Builder (BIB). BIB framework includes configuration layer, reports for triggering Organizational and Employees Data replication on backend side, it takes advantage of prepackaged Integration Flows on BTP Integration Suite and of the SuccessFactors oData API to upsert data into Employee Central entities (that means Crossboarding and Offboarding processes can be triggered from every external tool using SuccessFactors oData APIs for updating employees data).

BIB configuration documentation for replicating Employee and Organizational Data from SAP ERP to Employee Central can be found at following link: 

Introduction to Employee Data Replication to Employee Central

EC Mini-Master with Full EC Licenses, Pending Full EC Implementation

In this scenario, employee data can potentially be changed. Therefore, full offboarding and crossboarding processes can be covered. Below are some do's and don'ts for this scenario.

Leading practice recommends having one system as the source of changes for employee data. We recommend leveraging employee events in SAP on-prem and then updating EC. We don't recommend using hybrid scenarios (some events generated in EC and others in SAP on-prem) just because the customer has full licenses of EC. This hybrid scenario can generate inconsistencies and require many custom integrations. However, it is possible to start the employee data review by asking, for example, the offboardee to change their email to a personal one. Again, you need to ensure that the information is updated in SAP on-prem to avoid inconsistencies.

In addition to the information shared in the blog above, we would encourage our partners to view the following document which outlines for configuration partners some of the additional considerations when using EC Mini-Master and how this impacts both Onboarding and additional processes. 
A partner S-user is required to access this document - Onboarding with EC Mini Master Scoping and Considerations

Summary

Ideally, we recommend that all customers have an Employee Central license, as it offers the best user experience—not just during onboarding but as part of a comprehensive HR system. However, we hope the information above is helpful if you encounter customer scenarios where this isn’t the case. If you have any further questions, please post them below and tag the authors.

entry.title: Free SAP BTP own Global Account
entry.content:
First, need to create your global account using the "Pay-As-You-Go for SAP BTP" option, on the SAP BTP page. 

https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/pricing.html

After clicking "Start Now", you need to Sign in using your SAP ID.

Pay-As-You-Go for SAP BTP

Add SAP BTP Pay-AS-You-Go into the cart and finalize the buying process. All the way will show a $0 (Zero) amount to pay.

After finalizing the purchase, SAP will send an email like this one on the left and contract approved on the right:

Congratulations! You have your own SAP BTP account! Now the SAP system will perform the provisioning... It takes sometime. Be patient, You will receive another email like this one:

In that email shoeing the provisioning, you can access your SAP BTP instance following the link in the section "System URL", like https://emea.cockpit.btp.cloud.sap/cockpit/#/globalaccount/ XXXXXXXXX

Done!!! the creation of global account is complete!

In the next article I will show how to create the sub-accounts and create instances of Hana, ABAP, BAS, etc...

entry.title: Re: 🧰👷‍♂️ The SAP S/4HANA RISE & SAP BTP - Toolbox 👷‍♂️🧰
entry.content:
Hi @AndySilvey 

This is so well structured and very much in detail. Reading this might take me ages. I might have read only 5% of it and it keeps me engaged without loosing interest. This is a ocean of information. I cant thank you enough for this. I really wonder how much time or days you have put in for this blog. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Dump ACCESS_DENIED | cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_do...
entry.content:
Dear DominikTylczyn

'Are you still getting dumps after exception handling was added?'

No, but before adding exception handling I also had several executions without dumps.

Another user never got dumps and the KUser who reported it is absent, so I couldn't get any more information.

Thanks. Regards.

entry.title: Re: Problem Statement: HTTP 403 Error in SAP CPI IFlow Wh...
entry.content: Hi Prathiba, Can you check if the HTTP Session Reuse has been configured to On-exchange or On Integration flow for the configured i-flow ? If it is set to NONE you might have to check this and change this, you would find this option at Runtime Configuration of the Integration flow.
